title: aita for not wanting to stop vaping when my (18m) boyfriend wants me to
text: so i (17f) have seizures, and nicotine helps them a lot. i usally have 10 a day but after i’ve started vaping it’s gone down 70%. i have rules for myself about vaping. and i make sure i’m not doing it to much. my boyfriend doesn’t like it and wants me to stop. i feel like i’m the a-hole for not wanting to stop.

storyboard.content: I'm 17F and I have seizures. I usually have 10 seizures a day, but since I started vaping, that number has gone down by 70%.
I have rules for myself about vaping and I make sure I'm not doing it too much.
My boyfriend doesn't like that I vape and wants me to stop.
I don't want to stop vaping despite my boyfriend's objections.
